copy.title: Feint Supply Co. | Veteran Cybersecurity & Tactical Gear
copy.announcement: Welcome to Feint Supply Co. New drops added regularly. Free shipping on US orders over $50. Built different. By people who were.
copy.sale_message: Order received. Production takes 3-5 business days, then ships your way. Leave a review when it arrives - it means a lot. Thank you.
copy.policy_welcome: Feint Supply Co. exists at the intersection of service, security, and culture. Every design is built with intention - minimal, precise, and made for people who've operated in worlds most never see. We're committed to quality print-on-demand products that hold up as well as the people wearing them.
copy.policy_payment: We accept all major payment methods through Etsy's secure checkout, including credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and Etsy gift cards. All transactions are encrypted and processed safely through Etsy's platform. Payment plans are not available at this time.
copy.policy_shipping: All products are made to order through our print-on-demand partners, with a production window of 3-5 business days before shipment. US customers can expect delivery within 5-10 business days total from the date of purchase. International shipping is available, with delivery times varying by destination. Tracking information is provided for all orders once fulfilled.
copy.policy_refunds: We stand behind every product - if your item arrives damaged or defective, contact us within 14 days of delivery and we'll make it right. Please include a photo of the issue so we can resolve it quickly and accurately. Exchanges are available for defective items; we do not accept returns on items ordered in the correct size or style. Digital products, if applicable, are non-refundable.
copy.policy_additional: Some designs in this shop are developed with the assistance of AI-based design tools, combined with direction rooted in real operational and technical experience. Custom orders and design requests are welcome - send us a message and we'll see what we can build. Bulk and wholesale inquiries are also encouraged; discounts are available for larger orders.
copy.about_story:
Feint Supply Co. was built for a specific kind of person - one who's moved through high-stakes environments, learned to operate quietly, and now finds themselves navigating a different kind of mission. Whether that's a network operations center, a federal agency, a patrol shift, or a startup, the mindset doesn't change. Our collection reflects that continuity: the discipline, the dark humor, the precision, and the culture that doesn't translate well to a LinkedIn profile.

Each design starts with a concept rooted in real experience - the language of service, the aesthetics of operational culture, the inside references that only land with people who've been there. We believe good design should communicate something true. Not loud. Not performative. Just accurate. The kind of thing you wear because it says something you've never quite been able to put into words.

Cybersecurity culture runs deep in our catalog because the pipeline from military and law enforcement into the tech and security sectors is real, and it deserves its own visual language. The quiet professional doesn't need a brand screaming for attention. Our designs are built to be recognized by the right people and ignored by everyone else - and we think that's exactly right.

Every product is fulfilled through trusted print-on-demand partners, which means each item is made when it's ordered - no excess, no waste, and consistent quality across the catalog. We take the production process seriously because the people buying these products have standards, and we intend to meet them.
copy.about_headline: Designed for those who operated quietly.

faq.question: How long does shipping take?
faq.answer: All orders go through a production window of 3-5 business days before they ship, since everything is made to order. US customers typically receive their order within 5-10 business days total from the date of purchase.

faq.question: Can I customize a design?
faq.answer: Yes - send us a message through Etsy and tell us what you have in mind. We welcome custom requests and will do our best to build something that fits your vision.

faq.question: What if my item arrives damaged?
faq.answer: Contact us within 14 days of delivery with a photo of the damage and we'll take care of it. Replacements or exchanges are available for any item that arrives defective or damaged in transit.

faq.question: Do you ship internationally?
faq.answer: Yes, international shipping is available to most destinations. Delivery times vary by country, and tracking is provided once your order ships.

faq.question: What sizes are available?
faq.answer: T-shirts are available in a wide range of sizes, typically from S through 5XL depending on the style. Size charts are included on each product listing - we recommend checking them before ordering.

faq.question: Are these designs AI-generated?
faq.answer: Some designs are developed with the assistance of AI-based tools, guided by concepts and direction drawn from real operational and technical backgrounds. We're transparent about that process and believe the context and intent behind each design is what gives it meaning.
